compiled_state.title: Onboarding pre-commit hooks block initial bootstrap commit (chicken-and-egg)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Pre-commit hooks installed during onboarding block the initial commit that contains the hook infrastructure itself. The review gate requires a review before committing, but the review system depends on the files being committed. Hooks must be installed LAST (after all other onboarding artifacts are committed) to eliminate this bootstrap problem.
